title: html-explainer repo recap
claims_scope: Valid for the inspected repo state and files listed in source_context.
summary: Explains repo purpose, operating model, current strengths, risks, and next best action.
key_decisions: Treat generated HTML as decision surfaces, not decoration.
Preserve evidence, uncertainty, and next prompts.
known_limits: Does not prove behavior quality across scenario tests.
May become stale after major README, installer, command, or pattern changes.
original_prompt: Review this repo and help me understand its biggest opportunity using HTML only if it is justified.
handoff_prompt: /reenter-project inspect the current html-explainer repo state and refresh the replaceable repo recap if README, install scripts, commands, patterns, scripts, or CI changed materially.
next_action: Add scenario-based behavior tests before expanding feature scope.
